title: gilibertia monogyna
intro: Gilibertia monogyna, also known as the annual fleabane, is a perennial herb in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gilibertia monogyna include relief from congestion, coughs, and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Gilibertia monogyna can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
